titleStmt.title: SII 26.691: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 691. (A.R. No. 646 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgaśōḻadēva I: Year (lost), Ishabha (Vaikāśi), śu. 4, Saturday, Puṉarpūśam = 1074 A.D., May 3.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at both ends, and hence several particulars are lost. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc.

It records a gift of land, probably in the village of Tirunallam (details lost after receiving 4 kāśu from the temple of the same place, made by the sabhai of the place. It is stated that the land was made tax-free and was intended to provide food to the Śrī-māhēśvaras who attend the Tiruvādirai festival in the month of Mārgaḻi and the Viśākham festival in the month of Vaikāśi. It appears that the gift-land was granted under the name of Nālpattunālvar-viḷāgam after the sabhai of the place, and was handed over as maḍappuṟam to the tapsvi (ascetic) in the temple of Tirunallamuḍaiyār named Tiṭṭai Viḻumiyunāna-piḷḷai who and his progenies were required to feed the above-mentioned aḍiyārs attending the festivals. A number of persons figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka ja] yamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ena manṉavar Iṭutiṟai Iṭattikkanaittun taṉcakkara naṭātti virasiṁhāsanattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭai korājakhecaripanmarāṉa dhiribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku
mahāsabhaiom Ivvāṭṭai Iṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu canikkiḻamai ñcaturtthiyum peṟṟa pūṇarpūcatti nānṟu nammur tirumeṟkoyilāḻvān koyilile kūṭṭa paṇiyāl paṇittu Innāṭṭu
kācu 4 m caṇḍeśvaradevar ḷ pakkal koṇṭu mārkaḻit tiruvātiraittirunāḷilum vaikāci viśākhattirunāḷilum cevikka Eḻuntaruḷum śrīmāheśvararai Amutuceyvikka Iṟaiyili ce turāntakavatikku kiḻakku śrīkeraḷavā kkā
kiḻpāṟkellai vempaṭi śekharanilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai melpaṭiyār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirunallamuṭaiyār tevar tānam piccatevar viḷākattuk pāṟkellai pūṅkuṭi vāykkālukku
ricilvari Eccoṟum kuṟṟariciyum velikkācu maṟṟum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭina Iṟukkaveṇṭuvana nāṅkaḷe cantrādityavar śāśvatikamāka nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkak kaṭavomāka Iṟaiyili ce Ivvūr sabhaikku camaintu bhāradvāji tiru
śvaraṟku Amutu ceyya Ivvūr sapaiyār tirunāmattāl nālpattunālvar viḷākamenṟu Uṭaiyār tirunallamuṭaiyār koilil tavaśvi tiṭṭai viḻumiyunānapiḷḷai Aṭiyānumivan varggattārume maṭappuṟam tirunāḷkaḷil ṭiyārkaḷai Amutuceyvikka kaṭavarkaḷāka śa
ḻumiyānāna piḷḷai Aṭiyānukkivvaṉaivom Ivai paṇiyālivvūrk karaṇattānāvaṇamuṭaiyān mālarikecavan śrīvāsudevaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven bhāradvāji vaṭukanātaṉ marutamāṇikkateva[*]n Ippaṭi Aṟiven bhāradvāji vaṭukanātan tillai na
man puruṣottamanulakamuṇṭānen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Araiyanaḻakiyānen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āṭi Ūruṭaiyān Araiyan tiruvicalūren Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai bhāradvāji vikraman tirukkacuvanenippaṭi Aṟiven
Digital edition of SII 26.691 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
